tags.name: Leitfie Road

tags.description:
This street has 2 names: Davie Park Place and Macdonald Crescent.  Properties on the south side have a Macdonald Crescent address and those on the north side a Davie Park Place address.  

Note: A Google search suggests this dual name situation is not uni
